brand-story-img.query: Quiet Luxury, Made for Real Life Velmora was born from a simple belief: fine-feeling jewelry should not sit in a box waiting for special occasions. Each piece is designed in-house, cast in recycled brass, and finished with thick 18k gold plate — so it keeps its glow through morning coffee, evening plans, and everything between.
